text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text: Huh? I'm fine. Just a little nervous...

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm okay now. Talking to you has calmed me
down.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
But... I'm okay now. Talking to you has calmed me
down.

text_block_list.name: Rice Shower
text_block_list.text:
I'm going to do my absolute best... so don't take
your eyes off me!
